hero.title: Industry-Education Cooperation for Power Talent
hero.subtitle: Longxiang turns power equipment manufacturing, project practice, and international cooperation into training platforms for colleges, utilities, and industrial partners.

sections.title: Co-built Industrial College
sections.summary: A joint industrial college platform that links electrical majors with real manufacturing, engineering delivery, and new energy application scenarios.
body: Co-built programs connect classrooms with Longxiang's transformer, switchgear, photovoltaic, storage, and charging equipment resources.
The platform helps colleges present employable, project-ready talent development to local industry and overseas partners.
Longxiang can support curriculum cases, factory practice, training equipment, and joint demonstration programs.

sections.title: Collaborative Talent Training
sections.summary: A full-cycle training pathway connecting teaching, practical training, internship, employment, and professional improvement.
body: The talent system supports dual-mentor teaching, field practice, alternating study-training, and on-post internship routes.
Training scenarios extend from transformers and switchgear to photovoltaic, wind power, energy storage, and charging applications.

cards.title: Classroom & Project Discussion
cards.text: Coursework combines technical lectures, project review, and engineering case discussion.
points: Technical lectures and practical case reviews
Project-based teaching connected to industrial parks
Dual-mentor guidance from teachers and engineers

cards.title: Field Practical Training
cards.text: Students train in real outdoor electrical scenarios with safety supervision and practical tasks.
points: Line-field teaching and alternating study-training model
Power equipment, photovoltaic, wind power, and energy storage scenarios
On-post internships that prepare students for engineering work

cards.title: Dual-Mentor Guidance
cards.text: Enterprise engineers and college teachers work together to improve learning quality and workplace readiness.

sections.title: Teaching Equipment R&D
sections.summary: Longxiang transforms manufacturing know-how into teachable equipment platforms for electrical and new energy majors.
body: Training platforms can cover electrical control, switchgear, distribution, testing, operation, and maintenance workflows.
Practical hardware supports hands-on teaching, skill assessment, and integrated teaching-production demonstrations.
Equipment can be configured for colleges, vocational training bases, and overseas power talent programs.

sections.title: Industry-Research & International Cooperation
sections.summary: International cooperation and research collaboration help partners introduce power equipment experience, standards, and training capacity.
body: Longxiang works with education and research partners on smart microgrid, new energy, charging station, and advanced power equipment topics.
The platform supports technical exchange, overseas training cooperation, and localized power talent development.
International cooperation materials should use verified leadership and partner photos supplied by the company.

sections.title: Cooperation Philosophy
sections.summary: Industry empowers education, education feeds industry, and innovation drives upgrading.
body: Longxiang aims to deepen industry-education integration and science-education collaboration.
The platform supports talent cultivation and technical innovation for the construction of new power systems.
The long-term goal is to build a power and new energy education platform with domestic leadership and international connectivity.

sections.title: Education Cooperation Gallery
sections.summary: Campus, classroom, field training, factory visit, and cooperation platform moments from Longxiang's education program.

cta.title: Build Your Training Program with Longxiang
cta.text: Contact our education cooperation team for curriculum, training equipment, and joint talent development.
